Miller shared news Instagram account Tuesday, which left friends well-wishers state shock.
reported Today, cause toddler's untimely death drowning residential pool.

baby girl, Emmy, passed away yesterday.

love, light, spirit will never forgotten.

family respectfully requests privacy during this painful time."
